MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs THE CALIFORNIA-NEVADA ANNUAL CONFERENCE, and BISHOP MINERVA CARCANO's application of plaintiffs for Brent E. Rychener to appear as counsel PRO HAC VICE.

The motion is granted. No opposition filed and the application conforms to CRC 9.40.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
